MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-17-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-23-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLTF; RE: CHANGED OF SETT CONF DATE FROM 7/16/01 TO 7/17/01.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503B. MICHAEL ROSSOFF, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER/N. OLCOMENDY, CLERKS. NO REPORTER. PARTIES PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE II FOR PLTFS. CITY HOUSING, INC. ALSO PRESENT DEFT, PRO PER, DONALD TURNER. OFF THE COURT RECORD CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN STIP. APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 459 TURK STREET #309 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,575.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE NOW, STAY PHYSICAL EVICT. TO 7/31/01 5:00 P.M GEN RELEASE AND WAIVER OF LIABILITY ARISING THROUGH TENANCY. CIV. CDE. 1542 WAIVER. DEFT. ONLY CLAIMS RIGHT TO POSSESS. SEC. DEP. FORFEITED TO PLTF. EACH BEARS ATTY. FEES AND COST. PLTF. VACATES JDGMT AND DIMISSES ACTION OF DEFT. COMPLIES.
